name: cf-ai-card
description: 创非凡数智名片 monorepo bootstrap

scripts.e2e:install: corepack pnpm exec playwright install chromium
scripts.webvitals:test: corepack pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.performance.config.ts
scripts.api:lint: services/api/.venv/Scripts/python -m ruff check services/api tools/sync_openapi_contract.py tools/release
scripts.worker:test: services/worker/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m ruff check services/worker && services/worker/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest services/worker/tests -m "not integration"
scripts.perf:test: services/api/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m ruff check --config services/api/pyproject.toml tools/perf && services/api/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tools/perf/tests
scripts.check: corepack pnpm contracts:check && corepack pnpm contracts:validate && corepack pnpm api:lint && corepack pnpm api:test && corepack pnpm worker:test && corepack pnpm perf:test && corepack pnpm perf:smoke && corepack pnpm release:test && corepack pnpm web:test && corepack pnpm web:build && corepack pnpm admin:test && corepack pnpm admin:build
